notes: Autonomous agriculture technology is useful Stage 1 evidence, but equipment sales, ROI, and software attachment must verify it.
Precision agriculture can be promising while the machinery company is still capped by farm-income and financing cycles.

company_name: Zoetis bird flu vaccine conditional clearance
notes: Conditional approval and stockpile rebuilding can move disease news toward Stage 2, but recurring use must be checked.
Egg-price profit spikes can be real cyclical success, but price normalization and investigations cap Green.

company_name: Duolingo AI strategy and softer bookings
notes: Education apps need bookings and monetization; AI features and user growth alone can still break the thesis.

company_name: Juul FDA tobacco and menthol e-cigarette approval
notes: Regulatory approval can change Stage materially, but scope, channels, social backlash, and reversal risk remain core checks.
Vertical farming can fail when consumers do not pay enough premium to cover energy and capex.
Hydroponics/greenhouse capex without unit economics can become hard 4C.
Education recurring revenue can break when AI substitutes the core service or search traffic channel.
Online education platforms need CAC, completion, student ROI, partner concentration, and debt checks.

company_name: Whirlpool dividend suspension and hardware cycle
notes: Appliance hardware without recurring rental/care revenue remains exposed to housing and replacement cycles.
